description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a minimalist rectangular layout and flat roofs. The structure features two main volumes: a larger living area and a smaller detached section, both connected by a spacious patio. A large swimming pool dominates the outdoor space, bordered by light-colored paving. The house has extensive glass windows and sliding doors, especially along the pool-facing side, allowing for abundant natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a combination of concrete, glass, and metal elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a spacious poolside patio. The design features clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house volume, large pool, and patio area with flat roofs and extensive glazing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pool and the separation between the main house and the smaller detached section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, the pool, and the smaller structure at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the relationship between the two building volumes.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass sliding door with a flat overhang, flush with the patio and pool area, emphasizing seamless indoor-outdoor access.
